g.text: Catch rate: 95%+ regressions | Runs on every PR | Blocks merge on critical violations

a.text: As a developer, I need real-time accessibility feedback during development
so that I can fix issues immediately rather than discovering them in CI.
✓ Console warnings <2s after save | Storybook panel shows violations | Remediation guidance included

g.text: All tools support WCAG 2.1 AAA criteria
All warnings include element selectors + remediation guidance
